sections.source_heading: Excelシート名に関する規約
sections.h3_split_reason: Expected Sections list provides one effective section. All subsequent headings (シート内の構造, コメント, マーカーカラム, セルの書式, 日付の記述方法, セルへの特殊な記述方法) use === underline which are not h2 split-level headings per the rules, so all content is included within this single section.
